description: Illustrative document or title token pattern with issuing authority, holder binding, and revocation evidence.

authority.name: Example Issuing Authority
authority.delegationScope: Issues and revokes document/title token records for this example only.

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Production use requires source-of-truth and legal-recognition review.

rightsModel.legalClaim: Represents a verifiable reference to a document, title, license, or certificate record.
rightsModel.economicRights: None unless separately granted by source document.
rightsModel.redemptionRights: Not applicable; status is verified through issuing authority.
rightsModel.disputeForum: Issuing authority correction or appeal process.
